# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-068](task-0135): Provider Data Governance Rules

## Purpose

Implement provider data governance rules.

## Scope

- Governance rules
- Compliance
- Auditing

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Ensure compliance
3. Add auditing

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Compliant
3. Audited
